overview: Under 25 ADYPU is a premium youth community platform for students under 25, representing creativity, innovation, and collaboration. Features a bold, futuristic aesthetic with deep blue and gold branding, showcasing the community's events, projects, achievements, and student stories.
features: Full-width hero with glowing gold logo and animated tagline
Sticky glassmorphism navigation with dark/light mode toggle
About Us, Community showcase, Events & Projects, Gallery sections
Registration form with backend data persistence
Gold gradient buttons with hover glow animations
Blue tint gallery grid with gold accents
Minimal footer with gold social icons
